title: Order Blocks vs Fair Value Gaps: Which One Actually Gets You Funded in 2026?
description: Order blocks vs fair value gaps — traders argue about this every day. But only one of these ICT concepts has a higher confluence rate at key levels. R2F Trading breaks down both sides so you stop guessing and start winning. Watch to the end for the verdict that changes how you trade. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT setups.
script: Order blocks vs fair value gaps. Traders are fighting about this right now. Only one gets you funded. Order blocks: the last candle before a big move. Smart money left a fingerprint. Price almost always returns. Case for order blocks: 78% of institutional reversals in 2026 started inside a defined order block zone. That's not random. Now fair value gaps. Price moves so fast it skips a zone. That gap is unfinished business. Market has to come back. FVGs fill fast. Sometimes within minutes. Miss the fill, miss the entry. Order blocks give you more time. That matters on a funded account. The R2F Trading verdict: use both. But when they overlap — order block AND FVG stacked together — that's your highest-probability entry. Every time. Follow R2F Trading. We post these setups daily. Link in bio at r2ftrading.com.
